Join The TradFi Revolution

We are building a trading platform that combines the best elements of centralized and decentralized exchanges, allowing users to effortlessly trade stocks, forex, commodities and crypto CFDs all from one account. Zero Commissions, No KYC, Crypto Deposits.

How Will it Work?

Register

Open an account using just an email.

Fund Account

Fund your account using cryptocurrencies like ETH, SHIB, BNB etc

Start Trading

Trade 1000s of markets with leverage and tight spreads

Trade Thousands of markets

Why Tradecurve?

Tight Spreads
Say goodbye to ridiculously high trading fees, we will offer our users tight spreads and zero commissions when trading on our platform.
No KYC
Get trading in under 2 minutes. You can register quickly for an account with tradecurve by simply providing only your email address and a few basic details.
Range of Markets
You can access thousands of different assets across a range of global markets anytime, anywhere from any devices.
High Leverage
Enhance your profit potential by using our leverage tools, access up to 1:500 trading leverage across different assets.
Fast Execution
Enjoy lighting fast execution that is not only reliable but also cheap with low latency and minimal slippage.
VIP Accounts
Join the VIP members club and benefit from a number of perks including tailormade bonuses and custom trading conditions.

The TCRV Token

At the core of the Tradecurve ecosystem resides the TCRV token, which acts as the central catalyst empowering a variety of functions and opportunities. This utility token, designed around rewards, holds the capability to offset trading fees, unlock VIP memberships, staking, and much more.

Symbol: TCRV
Chain: Ethereum
Price: $0.025
Supply: 1,800,000,000

Token Utilities

TCRV is the primary currency within the Tradecurve ecosystem. This utility token will provide users that hold TCRV with rewards and perks they can use instantly inside the Tradecurve trading platform once the token officially launches on Uniswap.

Buy Presale Token
Membership
Access premium features through our VIP Members Club, enjoying exclusive benefits such as customized bonuses, weekly rebates, and level-up rewards.
Rewards
Boost your income while trading with Tradecurve's Rewards Program, which encourages user engagement with a variety of enticing advantages.
Staking
Users can stake cryptocurrencies along with TCRV tokens and receive a fixed rate of interest paid in stablecoins.
Discounts
Unlock discounts on your trading transactions by utilizing TCRV tokens, enabling you to enjoy significant cost savings throughout our entire ecosystem.

Roadmap

We aim to become a truly anonymous trading exchange, handing the control back to our community. See our roadmap and project goals below.

2023
Stage 1
  • Group Formation
  • Presale Website Live
  • Social Communities
  • TCRV Token Audit
  • Founder KYC
  • Marketing PR Campaign
  • Launch Public Presale
Stage 2
  • CMC Listing
  • Coingecko Listing
  • Phase 2 Marketing Campaign
  • Demo Platform Launch
  • Live Platform Launch (Beta)
  • App Store & Google Store Listing
  • Launch On UniSwap
2023
Stage 2
  • CMC Listing
  • Coingecko Listing
  • Phase 2 Marketing Campaign
  • Demo Platform Launch
  • Live Platform Launch (Beta)
  • App Store & Google Store Listing
  • Launch On UniSwap
2024
Stage 3
  • Phase 3 Marketing
  • CEX Listing
  • Integrate Rewards Program
  • Trading Competition
  • Ambassador Recruitment
Stage 4
  • Trading Academy Launch
  • Host Community Trading Seminar
  • Tier-1 CEX Listing
2024
Stage 4
  • Trading Academy Launch
  • Host Community Trading Seminar
  • Tier-1 CEX Listing

FAQs

Buying is simple, click the buy now button register using an email address and select which currency you wish to use to make payment. We accept a wide range of cryptocurrencies.

You will receive your tokens at the end of the presale and these will be automatically airdropped to your wallet address. Please note to protect the floor price of $TCRV the airdrop will occur in line with the projects vesting schedule.

Tradecurve native token $TCRV will operate on the Ethereum network.

Yes, the smart contract has been audited. You can review the audit report by clicking the link on the audit section of our website.

The minimum amount of Tradecurve TCRV tokens you can purchase is $25

Once the presale finishes, presale holders will be able to claim their tokens from the claim section of the website. Please note that $TRCV tokens are vested for a period of 4 months. You will receive 25% of your tokens each month from the claim section.

Risk Warning: Cryptocurrency may be unregulated in your jurisdiction. The value of cryptocurrencies may go down as well as up. Profits may be subject to capital gains or other taxes applicable in your jurisdiction.
